wireTable.note: w3 power-of-two mask → primary bit; secondary = order within shared context VA. Object slot offsets are not wire indices.

pe.registrarNote: Batch registrar w3 masks map to wire primary bits; secondaries are registration order within shared context VAs. Object slot offsets are recorded for audit but are not wire indices.

hypothesis.note: Proven = PE registrar name at (primary,secondary) AND ≥1 live value in plausible range. Primary-1 apply hypothesis is refuted.

timedCombatEvidence.note: Samples are netId-timed from type-107; fuse binds via CastSpellAns winners before setting combatStatsKnown.

timedHpEvidence.note: Carry-forward densify onto Replay API 1Hz frames once all 10 heroes have explicit mMaxHP; values stay wire (5,0)/(5,1) — never invented.

peAttempts.refutedPrimary1Detail: Old apply map primary-1 is not the PE registrar table; (1,6) once at 2503 is not mFlatMagicDamageMod

note: Gate B1 PE wire table proven: w3 mask→primary, shared-context secondary order; HP (5,0)/(5,1) positive control; combat under primary 2 offset+3. Primary-1 hypothesis refuted. calculatorReady still blocked by early MonkeyKing explicit mMaxHP gap before first all-10 HP.

calculatorReadyBlocker.detail: Gate B1 combat wire table is proven (combatTrusted=true). Trusted HP densify can cover Replay API frames only after all 10 heroes have explicit mMaxHP. MonkeyKing (0x400000af) first accepts at ~77278ms while other heroes accept at ~267ms; early Replay API frames (timeline starts ~60000ms) cannot honestly set hpKnown without inventing HP. Full-chunk type-107 walk shows no earlier MonkeyKing (5,1) — combat-only vectors appear first; not a parse/filter miss.
